---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected, and how often? Be specific about the current pain point. -->



## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. What should the system do that it doesn't do today? Include any relevant UI/UX considerations, API changes, or data model changes. -->



## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why did you prefer the proposed solution over them? -->



## Clinical Safety Considerations

<!-- 
Complete this section if the feature involves any of the following:
- AI-generated recommendations or clinical decision support
- Display of patient clinical data
- Treatment planning or appliance selection
- Any output that a clinician might act on

If none of the above apply, write "N/A".
-->

**Does this feature produce or display clinical recommendations?**
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

If yes:
- How will the system communicate that outputs are decision support, not clinical decisions?
- What confidence level or uncertainty information will be surfaced to the user?
- What disclaimer text will accompany AI-generated outputs?
- How will recommendations be logged for audit purposes?
- What happens if the AI engine is unavailable or returns low-confidence output?

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, related issues, relevant clinical guidelines, or any other context that helps scope the request. -->
